user.title: Steam Inventory — Steam Accounts
user.description: Enter your Steam account IDs. Format: `steamid:name,steamid:name` (e.g. `{example}`). Inventories must be public.

settings.title: Steam Inventory — Settings
settings.description: The integration will auto-discover all your Steam games with marketable items.

data.strict_missing_ratio: Strict missing ratio (0–1) — recommended: 0.3 (skip if >30% prices missing)
data.min_item_value: Minimum item value (EUR, 0 = all) — recommended: 0.5 to ignore cheap items
data.max_items: Maximum items per game (0 = no limit) — recommended: 200 for large inventories
data.include_trading_cards: Include Steam trading cards (App 753, context 6) — can add hundreds of items
data.fetch_floats: Fetch CS2 float values via CSGOFloat API (CS2 only, opt-in)

data.import_start_date: Import start date (YYYY-MM-DD, empty = full history)

error.invalid_steam_ids: Invalid Steam ID format. Must be 17-digit numbers, optionally followed by :alias.

data.include_trading_cards: Include Steam trading cards (hundreds of items)
